failure_modes: evidence_quality_medium: analyses are metadata-derived, not content-reviewed

actionability.evidence: Stages clear with distinct roles. But without high-confidence analyses, trigger semantics are imprecise.

compatibility.evidence: All members from single source (addyosmani/agent-skills, MIT). No tool conflicts.

conflict_control.evidence: No unresolved conflicts. No relation edges indicate conflicts.

coverage.evidence: 7 members across 4 stages. Could add documentation or context engineering for broader coverage.

evidence_quality.evidence: Members have analyses but medium-confidence (metadata-derived). No full content review performed.

freshness.evidence: All version pins from 2026-07-08 sync. Source is regularly synced.

non_redundancy.evidence: 2 excluded with reasoning. TDD + code-review may partially overlap on quality. Incremental and planning are distinct.

relevance.evidence: Covers full SDLC: plan→implement→test→review→deploy. High-demand intent for agent coding workflows.

recommendations.action: Upgrade analyses from medium to high confidence via content inspection of SKILL.md source files
Consider adding documentation-and-adrs or context-engineering as optional stage-0 members
